homepage.heroSubline: Mc New Excavating Inc. delivers reliable excavation services across Baltimore and surrounding counties. We handle tough jobs with precision and efficiency.
aboutText: Mc New Excavating Inc. has been a trusted name in Baltimore excavation for over a decade. Founded by lifelong Maryland residents, we understand the unique challenges of our local terrain and infrastructure.

Our approach is simple: get the job done right, on time, and within budget. We prioritize clear communication, meticulous planning, and unwavering commitment to safety on every project, large or small.
We're proud to be part of the Baltimore community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to minimize our environmental impact, ensuring a sustainable future for our city.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise
valueProps.description: Deep understanding of Baltimore's soil conditions, permitting processes, and infrastructure.

valueProps.title: Reliable Results
valueProps.description: We deliver consistent, high-quality excavation services, minimizing delays and maximizing efficiency.

valueProps.title: Safety First
valueProps.description: Stringent safety protocols and experienced personnel ensure a safe work environment for everyone.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: Clear, upfront estimates with no hidden fees. You'll know exactly what to expect.

homepage.ctaSubline: Contact Mc New Excavating Inc. today to discuss your project needs.

services.name: Site Preparation
services.shortDescription: Comprehensive site preparation for construction projects of any size.
services.description:
Laying the groundwork for successful construction starts with thorough site preparation. Mc New Excavating Inc. handles every aspect, from initial clearing and grubbing to precision grading and compaction. We understand the importance of a stable foundation, especially in Baltimore's diverse soil conditions, which are susceptible to shifting. Our experienced team utilizes advanced equipment and techniques to ensure your site is perfectly prepared for building, paving, or landscaping. We address potential drainage issues proactively, preventing costly problems down the road. Whether it's a new residential development in Canton or a commercial building in the Inner Harbor, we provide the expertise and resources to get your project off to a strong start.

We navigate the complex permitting process in Baltimore City and surrounding counties, ensuring compliance with all local regulations. Our commitment to safety and environmental responsibility is unwavering. We implement erosion control measures and minimize disruption to the surrounding environment. With Mc New Excavating Inc., you can be confident that your site preparation is in the hands of skilled professionals.

faq.question: What is involved in site preparation?
faq.answer: Site preparation includes clearing vegetation, removing debris, grading the land to the correct elevation, and compacting the soil to create a stable base for construction.

faq.question: Why is proper site preparation important?
faq.answer: Proper site preparation ensures a stable foundation, prevents drainage issues, and allows for efficient construction, ultimately saving time and money.

faq.question: Do you handle erosion control?
faq.answer: Yes, we implement comprehensive erosion control measures to protect the surrounding environment and comply with local regulations.

services.name: Foundation Excavation
services.shortDescription: Precise foundation excavation for new construction and additions.
services.description:
The foundation is the backbone of any structure. Mc New Excavating Inc. specializes in precise foundation excavation, ensuring a solid and reliable base for your building. We understand the unique challenges posed by Baltimore's clay soil, which can expand and contract with changing moisture levels, potentially compromising foundation integrity. Our experienced operators use advanced equipment to excavate to the exact specifications, minimizing the risk of future problems. Whether you're building a rowhouse in Federal Hill or a modern home in Mount Vernon, we have the expertise to handle any foundation excavation project.

We work closely with engineers and builders to ensure accurate placement and proper drainage around the foundation. We address potential issues proactively, preventing costly repairs down the road. Our commitment to safety is unwavering, and we adhere to strict safety protocols on every job site. With Mc New Excavating Inc., you can be confident that your foundation excavation is in the hands of skilled professionals.

faq.question: How deep do you excavate for a foundation?
faq.answer: The depth of excavation depends on the building design, soil conditions, and local building codes. We work closely with engineers to determine the correct depth for your project.

faq.question: What type of equipment do you use?
faq.answer: We use a range of excavators, backhoes, and other specialized equipment to ensure precise and efficient excavation.

faq.question: Do you handle foundation drainage?
faq.answer: Yes, we install drainage systems around the foundation to prevent water damage and maintain structural integrity.

services.name: Trenching and Utility Installation
services.shortDescription: Expert trenching services for utility lines, drainage systems, and pipelines.
services.description:
Mc New Excavating Inc. provides expert trenching services for a variety of applications, including utility lines, drainage systems, and pipelines. We understand the importance of precision and safety when working around underground utilities. Our experienced operators utilize advanced equipment and techniques to minimize disruption and ensure accurate installation. Whether you're installing new gas lines in Fells Point or repairing a sewer line in Hampden, we have the expertise and resources to handle any trenching project.

We adhere to strict safety protocols and comply with all local regulations. We utilize underground locating services to identify and avoid existing utilities. Our commitment to environmental responsibility is unwavering. We minimize disruption to the surrounding environment and restore the site to its original condition. With Mc New Excavating Inc., you can be confident that your trenching project is in the hands of skilled professionals.

faq.question: How do you locate underground utilities?
faq.answer: We utilize underground locating services and follow strict protocols to identify and avoid existing utilities.

faq.question: What type of trenches can you dig?
faq.answer: We can dig trenches for a variety of applications, including utility lines, drainage systems, and pipelines.

faq.question: Do you handle backfilling and compaction?
faq.answer: Yes, we backfill trenches with appropriate materials and compact the soil to ensure stability.

services.name: Demolition Services
services.shortDescription: Safe and efficient demolition services for residential and commercial properties.
services.description:
Mc New Excavating Inc. offers safe and efficient demolition services for residential and commercial properties. We understand the complexities of demolition, particularly in densely populated areas like Baltimore. Our experienced team utilizes specialized equipment and techniques to minimize disruption and ensure the safety of surrounding structures. Whether you're demolishing a small shed in Canton or a commercial building in the Inner Harbor, we have the expertise and resources to handle any demolition project.

We obtain all necessary permits and comply with all local regulations. We implement dust control measures and minimize noise pollution. Our commitment to environmental responsibility is unwavering. We recycle materials whenever possible and dispose of waste responsibly. With Mc New Excavating Inc., you can be confident that your demolition project is in the hands of skilled professionals.

faq.question: Do you obtain demolition permits?
faq.answer: Yes, we obtain all necessary permits before starting any demolition project.

faq.question: How do you control dust during demolition?
faq.answer: We implement dust control measures such as water spraying and covering debris to minimize air pollution.

faq.question: Do you recycle demolition materials?
faq.answer: Yes, we recycle materials such as metal, concrete, and wood whenever possible.

services.name: Land Clearing
services.shortDescription: Professional land clearing services for development and landscaping projects.
services.description:
Mc New Excavating Inc. provides professional land clearing services for development and landscaping projects. We understand the importance of preparing land for construction or other uses. Our experienced team utilizes specialized equipment and techniques to efficiently remove trees, brush, and other vegetation. Whether you're clearing land for a new residential development in Columbia or preparing a site for a commercial building in Bethesda, we have the expertise and resources to handle any land clearing project.

We comply with all local environmental regulations and implement erosion control measures to protect the surrounding environment. Our commitment to safety is unwavering. We operate with skilled professionals and always prioritize safety on every job site. With Mc New Excavating Inc., you can be confident that your land clearing project is in the hands of skilled professionals.

faq.question: What is involved in land clearing?
faq.answer: Land clearing involves removing trees, brush, and other vegetation from a site to prepare it for construction or other uses.

faq.question: Do you handle tree removal?
faq.answer: Yes, we have the equipment and expertise to safely remove trees of all sizes.

faq.question: What happens to the cleared vegetation?
faq.answer: We can either haul away the cleared vegetation or mulch it for use as ground cover.

services.name: Drainage Solutions
services.shortDescription: Effective drainage solutions to protect your property from water damage.
services.description:
Baltimore's unpredictable weather, with its heavy spring thunderstorms and the threat of flooding, makes effective drainage critical. Mc New Excavating Inc. specializes in designing and installing drainage solutions to protect your property from water damage. We understand the importance of proper drainage in preventing foundation problems, basement flooding, and soil erosion. Our experienced team utilizes advanced techniques and materials to create effective drainage systems tailored to your specific needs. Whether you need French drains installed in your Federal Hill rowhouse or a comprehensive stormwater management system for a commercial property in the Inner Harbor, we have the expertise and resources to handle any drainage project.

We assess your property's drainage needs and recommend the most effective solution. We install drainage systems with precision and care, ensuring proper functionality and long-term performance. Our commitment to environmental responsibility is unwavering. We minimize disruption to the surrounding environment and comply with all local regulations. With Mc New Excavating Inc., you can be confident that your drainage project is in the hands of skilled professionals.

faq.question: What are the signs of poor drainage?
faq.answer: Signs of poor drainage include standing water, flooded basements, soil erosion, and foundation problems.

faq.question: What types of drainage systems do you install?
faq.answer: We install a variety of drainage systems, including French drains, surface drains, and sump pumps.

faq.question: How can I prevent water damage to my foundation?
faq.answer: Proper drainage is essential for preventing water damage to your foundation. We can install a drainage system to divert water away from your foundation.

serviceAreas.content: Proudly serving Baltimore and surrounding communities.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Mc New Excavating did a fantastic job excavating the foundation for our new home in Federal Hill. They were professional, efficient, and very careful to avoid damaging the surrounding property. The team clearly communicated each step of the process and answered all of our questions. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We hired Mc New to prepare our site for a new commercial building downtown. They handled the clearing, grading, and compaction with precision. There were a few minor delays due to weather, but they kept us informed and worked hard to get the project back on schedule. Overall, very satisfied with their work.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: Mc New Excavating handled the trenching and utility installation for our new gas line. They were incredibly professional and efficient. The crew was respectful of my property and cleaned up thoroughly after the job was done. Will definitely use them again for future projects.

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: The team at Mc New Excavating made a difficult demolition project look easy. They demolished an old shed in my backyard safely and efficiently. Their communication was excellent throughout the process, and they left the site clean and ready for new construction. Great service!

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Mc New Excavating cleared a large area of land for our new landscaping project. They removed all the trees and brush quickly and efficiently. There was some minor damage to the lawn, but they repaired it promptly. I would recommend their services.

reviews.name: Robert S.
reviews.text: After years of dealing with a flooded basement, Mc New Excavating installed a fantastic drainage system. They were professional, knowledgeable, and very thorough. They explained the process clearly and answered all my questions. My basement is now dry as a bone!
